column1: 2. **Parent tasks (Task Name only)**: Only the task name is required
3. **Subtasks**: Fill in Subtask Name and all other fields as needed
4. Use valid Status and Tag values (see below)
- All other fields: EMPTY (only name is used for parent task)
### Example 2: Task with Subtasks Only (No Parent Row)
**If you don't include a parent row with empty Subtask Name:**
- First subtask row will create the parent task automatically
- Parent task will only have the name
- All subtasks will have their full details
- **Parent tasks**: Only Task Name is used
- Empty cells are allowed for optional fields
- Assignee email must match a project member
- Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
